data.title: President of The ETF Store: BlackRock may apply for SOL and XRP spot ETFs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nate Geraci, president of The ETF Store, said on the X platform, "It is predicted that BlackRock will apply for SOL and XRP spot ETFs. The SOL application may be submitted at any time, and XRP is expected to proceed after the SEC lawsuit is over."

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 82,000 USDT with a Narrowed 2.23% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 14, 2025, 02:50 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 82,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 82,048.78125 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.23% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: BlackRock's Potential Plans for SOL and XRP Spot ETFs
data.description: According to Odaily, Nate Geraci, President of The ETF Store, shared on the X platform that BlackRock is expected to apply for SOL and XRP spot ETFs. The application for SOL could be submitted at any time, while the XRP application is anticipated to follow the conclusion of the SEC lawsuit.

data.title: DoraHacks releases AI project scoring to improve hackathon review efficiency
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, DoraHacks has officially launched a new AI scoring mechanism to help hackathon organizers complete project reviews faster, smarter, and more efficiently.
The new AI-driven BUIDL review system has been launched, and submitted projects will automatically receive scores based on key indicators such as completeness and hype-to-value ratio, enabling reviewers to quickly identify high-quality projects and improve screening efficiency. It is reported that this function is an important part of the DoraHacks AI product matrix, and more AI functions will be released in the future.

data.title: A suspected Blockchain Capital address sold 766,000 ENS in the last three months, earning $8.2 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of chain analyst Ember, an institution (most likely Blockchain Capital) hoarded ENS at a low point, and then sold 766,000 ENS (worth about $17.71 million) in the past three months after the ENS price hit a high point in December last year, realizing a profit of $8.2 million.
They withdrew 1.306 million ENS (worth about $16.23 million) from Binance in 2023 through 4 addresses, with an average price of $12.4. After the ENS price broke through $40 at the end of 2024, ENS began to be transferred out one after another. At present, a total of 766,000 ENS (worth about $17.71 million) have been transferred out, with an average transfer price of $23.1. A profit of $8.2 million was realized. These ENS entered trading platforms such as OKX/Bybit/Gate through the 0xC4D...611 address. They currently hold 540,000 ENS (worth approximately $8.85 million).

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official website information, Trump's crypto project World Liberty Financial (WLFI) has completed its token sale, with a total financing amount of US$550 million.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees Mixed Performance with MANA and RAY Leading Gains and Losses
data.description:
According to PANews, the cryptocurrency market experienced varied movements on March 14, 2025. Leading the gains, MANA is currently priced at $0.272, marking a 2.91% increase. TIA follows with a price of $3.665, up by 2.75%. FET is trading at $0.501, showing a 2.24% rise, while AR is at $6.123, increasing by 2.22%. NEAR rounds out the top gainers with a price of $2.604, up by 1.96%.

Conversely, RAY leads the losses, currently priced at $1.511, reflecting a 4.25% decrease. AAVE is trading at $164.28, down by 2.87%. W has fallen to $0.0848, a decrease of 2.19%. OM is priced at $6.300, down by 1.82%, and NOT is at $0.00204, showing a 1.54% decline. These fluctuations highlight the dynamic nature of the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: High Net Worth Americans Increasingly Invest in Cryptocurrency, Survey Reveals
data.description:
According to PANews, a recent survey conducted by Grayscale Investments and Harris Poll indicates that 26% of American high net worth individuals, defined as those with over $1 million in investable assets, hold cryptocurrency. This figure surpasses the national average of 20%. Furthermore, 38% of these affluent investors anticipate incorporating crypto assets into their future portfolios, with 53% of those under 50 years old and 22% of those over 50 expressing this expectation.

The survey highlights that high net worth investors are increasingly influenced by factors such as the approval of spot Bitcoin ETFs, inflation, and geopolitical events, leading to heightened interest in the crypto market. Notably, 36% of these investors are closely monitoring Bitcoin. Additionally, 42% of high net worth individuals have acquired crypto assets based on recommendations from financial advisors, significantly higher than the 27% of average investors who have done the same.

Moreover, the survey reveals that 43% of investors over 50 and 48% of those under 50 are waiting for clearer regulatory policies before further engaging in the crypto market.
